content:
# 组合模式：顶部导航栏

## 适用场景

页面顶部的标题栏/导航栏，左侧标题或返回按钮，右侧操作按钮。是几乎所有页面的标配。

## 组合方式

CombinedView（layoutMode=flex, direction=row, mainAxisAlignment=space-between）+ 左右两个子元素（TextView 标题 + GraphView/TextView 操作）。

## AI Projection 示例

```json
{
  "type": "COMBINEDVIEW",
  "id": "navbar",
  "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
  "size": { "width": 375, "height": 56 },
  "layoutMode": "flex",
  "decoration": { "fill": { "color": "#ffffff" }, "shadow": { "color": "#00000014", "blur": 4, "offsetX": 0, "offsetY": 2 } },
  "flexLayout": {
    "direction": "row",
    "mainAxisAlignment": "space-between",
    "crossAxisAlignment": "center",
    "padding": [0, 16, 0, 16]
  },
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "TEXTVIEW",
      "id": "nav-title",
      "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
      "size": { "width": 200, "height": 28 },
      "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "首页", "style": { "fontSize": 18, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#1a1a1a" } } ] } ] }
    },
    {
      "type": "TEXTVIEW",
      "id": "nav-action",
      "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
      "size": { "width": 60, "height": 28 },
      "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "设置", "style": { "fontSize": 14, "color": "#1677ff" } } ], "align": "right" } ] }
    }
  ]
}
```

## 依赖的 Primitive

primitive-ui-combinedview, primitive-ui-textview

## 变体

- 带返回按钮：左侧 children 第一个换成箭头 GraphView/图标
- 居中标题：mainAxisAlignment=center，单 TextView 子元素
- 多操作按钮：右侧嵌套一个 row 方向的 CombinedView 容纳多个操作

metadata.description: 顶部导航栏：左标题右操作
